use_cases: Display user profile pictures with automatic fallback to initials when images fail to load
Show user online/offline/busy/away status indicators in real-time applications
Display team member avatars in dashboard or collaboration tool layouts
Render comment section or chat interface participant avatars
ai_summary: A composite Avatar component system built on Radix UI primitives featuring profile image display with automatic fallback to initials, status indicators for online presence (online, offline, busy, away), and positioning-aware avatar indicators. Uses CVA for variant management and Tailwind for minimalist styling.
